description_long: This is a vertical, freestanding wooden shelf unit with a modern, geometric design. The main structure consists of a tall, rectangular central spine with six angled shelves protruding symmetrically from both sides, creating a zigzag pattern. The base is a solid rectangular block, providing stability and possibly additional storage space. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the piece a natural and warm appearance. The shelves are open and do not have any doors, handles, or glass panels, making it suitable for displaying books, magazines, or decorative items. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A tall, freestanding wooden shelf with six angled, open shelves and a solid rectangular base, featuring a modern zigzag design and visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, central spine, and all six angled shelves in a symmetrical zigzag pattern.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the central spine and the depth of the shelves protruding outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, uninterrupted back panel and the ends of the angled shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the shelf depth and the solid base.
